title: More Nonsense Limerick 67
content:
There was an old person of Ickley,
    Who could not abide to ride quickly;
    He rode to Karnak 
    On a tortoise's back,
    That moony old person of Ickley.
meaning:
"More Nonsense Limerick 67" is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
